summary: Persistent caching for ReactiveUI apps with explicit serializer and SQLite-provider configuration.
recommendedPatterns: Initialize Akavache with the builder pattern.
Keep Akavache behind repository or service abstractions.
avoidPatterns: Do not hide caching policy directly in views.
Do not scatter unstable cache keys throughout the codebase.
setupSteps: Add Akavache.Sqlite3 and a serializer package.
Configure the cache database through the builder.
Use the appropriate cache buckets intentionally.
commonPitfalls: Treating the cache like an unversioned key-value junk drawer.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
